title: Phase 0: Foundation
description: CDK scaffold, DynamoDB, S3, Cognito, VPC — Week 1-2

title: Phase 1: Single Agent
description: AgentCore Runtime + Strands + Memory + Skills — Week 3-4

title: Phase 2: Chat Gateway
description: Vercel Chat SDK on Fargate, SSE bridge, Slack + Web — Week 5-6

title: Resolve DynamoDB schema contradictions
description: Gap analysis found 4 incompatible DDB schemas across docs. Canonicalize to the 6-table version from ClawCore-Final-Architecture-Plan.md

title: Rename ClawCore → Chimera throughout docs
description: Search-replace ClawCore/clawcore with Chimera/chimera in all 48 docs and CDK code

title: Implement SSE bridge between Strands and Vercel Data Stream Protocol
description: Critical gap: no implementation exists for translating AgentCore streaming → Vercel DSP. Needed for chat gateway.

title: Research: Platform Architecture & Multi-Tenancy Validation
description: Validate existing Chimera architecture against latest AWS AgentCore/Strands/Bedrock capabilities. Assess multi-tenant isolation model (MicroVM, Cedar, DDB partition). Evaluate git-backed agent workspaces (EFS vs S3 vs CodeCommit). Validate team-deploy-to-own-account model where each user interacts in parallel + collaboratively. Check if the 6-table DDB design, 8-stack CDK structure, and Cognito tenant model are optimal. Output: docs/research/validation/
closeReason: Merged 3 validation docs + index from lead-arch-validation (all builders + index writer)

title: Research: Agent Collaboration & Communication Layer
description: Deep dive into inter-agent communication patterns using AWS services: SQS, EventBridge, SNS, SES, Step Functions, A2A protocol. How can agents collaborate in real-time and asynchronously? How do users collaborate THROUGH agents? Evaluate pub/sub vs queue vs event-driven patterns. Compare with OpenClaw Lane Queue model vs Strands Swarm/Graph. Research agent-to-agent notification, task handoff, shared memory, and collaborative problem-solving. Output: docs/research/collaboration/
closeReason: Merged 6 collaboration research docs + index from lead-agent-collab

title: Research: Self-Evolution, ML Experiments & Advanced Capabilities
description: Research self-improving agent capabilities: auto-skill generation, prompt A/B testing, model routing optimization. AWS infrastructure self-modification (CDK self-edit with safety rails via Cedar). ML experiment capabilities like Karpathy autoresearch pattern - agents running experiments, fine-tuning, evaluation loops. Self-expanding swarm: agents that spawn new agents. Research SageMaker, Bedrock fine-tuning, Step Functions for experiment orchestration. Output: docs/research/evolution/
closeReason: Merged 3 evolution research builders: skills/sandbox, experiments/ML, infra/swarm

title: Research: AWS Native & OSS Integration Enhancement
description: Comprehensive review of ALL AWS services that could enhance the platform beyond what existing docs cover. OSS projects: OpenSandbox, Strands, Cedar, MCP ecosystem, Playwright. Compare feature-by-feature with OpenClaw/NemoClaw - what we do better, what is missing, what is new. IaC strategy deep dive: CDK vs OpenTofu vs Pulumi, self-modifying IaC patterns. New capabilities: browser automation, code interpreter, AWS account infra control, MCP tool marketplace. Output: docs/research/integration-enhancement/
closeReason: Merged all 4 research docs + index from lead-aws-oss-integration
